'''vataga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nickname|nickname]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-t-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nickname|nickname]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vataga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vætægæth|vætægæth]] || [[word:vætægæj|vætægæj]] || [[word:vætægæsh|vætægæsh]] || [[word:vætægæ|vætægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vatatagath|vatatagath]] || [[word:vatatagaj|vatatagaj]] || [[word:vatatagash|vatatagash]] || [[word:vatataga|vatataga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vatagath|vatagath]] || [[word:vatagaj|vatagaj]] || [[word:vatagash|vatagash]] || [[word:vataga|vataga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vatafgath|vatafgath]] || [[word:vatafgaj|vatafgaj]] || [[word:vatafgash|vatafgash]] || [[word:vatafgaf|vatafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vatagatha|vatagatha]] || [[word:vatagaja|vatagaja]] || [[word:vatagasha|vatagasha]] || [[word:vatagaka|vatagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vatagath|vatagath]] || [[word:vatagaj|vatagaj]] || [[word:vatagash|vatagash]] || [[word:vataga|vataga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vatagathal|vatagathal]] || [[word:vatagajal|vatagajal]] || [[word:vatagashal|vatagashal]] || [[word:vatagakal|vatagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vatagathatha|vatagathatha]] || [[word:vatagajaja|vatagajaja]] || [[word:vatagashasha|vatagashasha]] || [[word:vatagaka|vatagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vatagathan|vatagathan]] || [[word:vatagajan|vatagajan]] || [[word:vatagashan|vatagashan]] || [[word:vatagakan|vatagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vatagathaoro|vatagathaoro]] || [[word:vatagajaoro|vatagajaoro]] || [[word:vatagashaoro|vatagashaoro]] || [[word:vatagakaoro|vatagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
